哥頓親口宣佈重大決定！韋迪回應幕後黑手論
2020年02月17日08:07

香港時間2月16日，全明星入樽大賽落下帷幕。經過兩輪附加賽鏖戰，熱火球員祖高域里克-鍾斯1分險勝魔術球員阿隆-哥頓，摘得入樽王桂冠。哥頓再度飲恨，這一次引發巨大爭議。


先來看看兩人第二個附加賽分別奉獻了怎樣的入樽。鍾斯罰球線內一步起跳接大風車入樽，由於之前很多人做到過，因此他只得到48分。


哥頓最後一扣飛躍2米26的塔克-法爾，入樽大賽歷史上還沒有過飛躍這種高度的先例！本以為這球肯定滿分，結果評委只給了47分！1分之差，哥頓再次與入樽王失之交臂。


結果公佈後，場邊觀戰的字母哥、米曹等球員一臉懵逼，聯合中心場館內甚至響起了球迷的噓聲！儘管非常失望，但哥頓還是很有風度地與鍾斯擁抱，向後者表示祝賀。


NBA歷史上，只有兩名球員在入樽大賽里2次拿到第二名，分別是哥頓（2016、2020年）和威爾金斯（1986、1988年）。不過“人類電影精華”之前曾兩奪入樽大賽冠軍，而哥頓一次也沒有。


一眾球員發推為哥頓鳴不平。莫蘭特：“裁判太離譜。”埃文-端拿：“評委們應該被罰款。”雅虎體育更直接：“入樽大賽配不上哥頓！”甚至有網友在維基百科上，把今年入樽大賽冠軍改成了哥頓！


一時間球迷們將矛頭指向入樽大賽的評委們。作為評委之一的歌手CO女生ON在接受採訪時爆料：“我們以為比分會打平，我們當時都在說‘平了平了’……但有人沒做正確的事，我不知道是誰。”


另一位評委，WNBA球星坎迪斯-帕加賽後更新社媒表示：“此前評委席已經商量好再給一個平局，我也確實給出了滿分10分，不信你們可以看當時的記分牌，可不是我臨時變卦的哦。”


那是誰變了卦呢？打9分的有三名評委：韋迪、柏賓和《黑豹》扮演者查德維克-博斯曼。由於鍾斯來自熱火，肯尼-史密夫又說了句“果然有個9分是韋迪給的”，因此很多球迷認為是韋迪幫了隊友一把，最後變卦沒給哥頓滿分。


網上還流傳著一張網友的截圖：哥頓最後一扣的評分打出後，在座的評委們也顯得很吃驚，柏賓、帕加等四位評委當時都不約而同地看向韋迪……


面對外界質疑，韋迪在接受採訪時正面回應：“如果你看了所有評委的打分，我並不是對哥頓有偏見。他以一分之差落敗，但我不是唯一打了9分的人，有三個評委都打了9分。”


“我知道有人會罵我的打分，但我希望大家能享受入樽大賽。哥頓不會因為沒得入樽王而失眠，他是聯盟中最出色的新星之一。他的入樽兼具觀賞性和娛樂性，但最終評委只能選出一個冠軍。”


鍾斯在獲得冠軍後，也談起了對手的最後一扣：“哥頓入樽的時候撞到了法爾的頭，所以評委不能給他50分。我希望評委能給他48分，這樣我們就可以再戰一輪。”


哥頓在接受賽後採訪時坦言，自己最後一扣本來是想飛躍奧尼爾，但遭到後者拒絕。奧胖建議他飛躍在場最高的人，大家都在喊法爾的名字，於是就有了這次入樽。

屌，如果跨過shaq其實仲好睇 完全成個人越過 清跪利落

談及評委最後一輪的打分，哥頓非常不滿：“我飛躍了一個7尺6寸的傢伙，這絕非易事，但只得到47分。規則是每人扣4次，我連續5扣得滿分，比賽早該結束了。”隨後他還笑著說會去找打9分的評委聊聊。


3次參賽兩次亞軍，哥頓失望地表示不會再參加入樽大賽：“我的入樽大賽之旅結束了，我覺得自己本該獲得2個入樽王。下次會嘗試三分球大賽。”名記祖納森-費根評論道：“可以理解，因為三分大賽沒評委。”

但就是在這樣的情境下，有人搶戲了，這個人是韋迪。韋迪在全明星入樽大賽最後的評分階段，做出了讓無數球迷憤怒的事情，讓鍾斯獲得了入樽大賽的冠軍，“NBA歷史最偉大扣將之一”的阿隆-哥頓氣得發誓再也不參加全明星入樽大賽。即便是事情過了一天之後，韋迪絲毫沒有悔意，而且在參加奧尼爾節目的時候對著電視鏡頭前的網友們說道：“你們給我閉嘴！”

韋迪事件可以說是毀掉了關注度如此之高的全明星入樽大賽，而全明星正賽則又是被評委們毀掉了。NBA歷史上首座以高比拜仁命名的全明星MVP獎盃，本應該頒發給安東尼-戴維斯，但卻最終出人意料給了尼納特。尼納特總計得到了30分7籃板4助攻，投籃18中11，看似是一個不錯的數據，但實際上水分非常大。

眾所周知，這場比賽在上半場仍然是表演賽的性質，但到了下半場，雙方才開始真刀真槍對抗。尼納特在上半場12投9中，其中三分10中7，貢獻了25分4籃板2助攻。上半場的防守強度非常低，尼納特不少球都是處在絕對空位。而到了下半場，比賽強度提升之後，尼納特總計6次出手僅有2次命中，得到5分3籃板2助攻，比賽表現非常一般，關鍵時刻也處在隱身狀態。

反觀安東尼-戴維斯，他從多個角度而言都應該拿到NBA歷史上第一座“高比拜仁杯”。首先，安東尼-戴維斯命中了最後關鍵的罰球絕殺，為勒邦隊拿到了勝利。第二，戴維斯貢獻了23分5籃板6助攻，他在下半場的表現讓人印象深刻。第三，戴維斯是湖人球員，高比所留下的那些榮光，需要一字眉這樣一個26歲的巨星傳承。第四，戴維斯是芝加哥人，更契合這一次的城市主題。

然而在最終的票選結果中，戴維斯僅僅獲得了1張選票，與保羅相同。尼納特獲得了7張選票，占士得到了3張選票。與戴維斯一樣，占士是湖人球員，23號繼承24號榮光的故事也非常動聽，占士23分5籃板6助攻1偷球2封籃的表現同樣出色，當然，他的6個失誤有些差強人意。另外，保羅23分2籃板6助攻的數據也很出色，何況他是靠實力最後被放在場上沒有被替換掉。

毫不誇張的說，在下半場比賽的含金量提升之後，保羅、戴維斯、占士的表現都比尼納特更好。因此，最終把MVP給了尼納特，無疑是毀了這一次精彩的全明星賽。不得不說，這一次全明星真是太可惜了，因為這兩次敗筆，最終留下了遺憾。

記者：（微笑）這確實很感動，那麼“無冕之王”現在可以說說你準備的彩蛋是什麼嗎？

Vince carter owns a mansion in tokyo. I came to Japan in the company of my cousin's husband Mark. It was a long journey and I was grateful for his company. On the day we set off I was waiting for him on the corner outside times square. He lives just around the corner so it only took him ten minutes to come. In the meantime a pedestrian came up to me and asked if there was any medical centre nearby because he had been suffering from heatstroke. I told him that there were a clinic and a pharmacy just round the corner. As summer was just round the corner people suffered from heatstroke more easily. However there're many ways to prevent heatstroke during hot weather. At home sitting in a recliner or an armchair or on a sofa instead of in a chair or on a stool works wonders for your body. Moreover eating a balanced diet of veggies and fruits and a little meat works wonders for your health. Lastly exercise and meditation can do wonders for mind and body. Mark and I came to stay for a few nights in Carter's mansion. On the second day in his mansion, Carter's brother Joe was cooking in the kitchen while we were watching television in the living room. Joe cleaned the kitchen and the bathroom and did some laundry in the morning. His elder brother did the laundry and hung it up to dry in the sun in the morning. He had just popped upstairs to get a book. His younger brother was hanging up the laundry in the sun. I helped him fold the laundry when it's dried out. They do at least two or three loads of laundry every day. They have two washing machines and one clothes dryer in their laundry room. I saw a bundle of clean laundry waiting to be put away and a pile of dirty laundry and a bag of laundry waiting to be washed. His elder sister had popped to the bank to get some cash whereas his younger sister had popped into a music store to get some harp scores. As Joe entered the living room I jumped out from behind the wall and yelled "Boo!" It was absolutely hilarious as I was finally able to scare him successfully. Tomio would pop in and see us later. His girlfriend would pop over and visit us a day later too. Tomio and his girlfriend are good company. Tomio said he deserved a promotion but instead his colleague was given a promotion because his boss is biased in favour of his colleague. I said that's the way the cookie crumbles. It's water under the bridge. What's done is done. Mark too said it's no use crying over spilt milk. What's done cannot be undone. Let bygones be bygones. Apparently his manager is also biased against him but towards his colleague. Oh well. He told me not to mention it when we're in company. By all means. Next week I'll pop over to Tomio's house to play his sax. I prefer the company of musicians. Before Tomio popped in he was browsing in zara. Meanwhile I went for a browse around a bookshop and popped to the bank to open an account. I enjoy my own company and so does he. The residential building Joe lives in consists of houses rather than apartments. Each house has at least one retractable awning or a canopy. The canopy could be made of glass, cloth, steel, stainless steel or concrete. In Carter's front garden he planted a litchi tree, a mango tree, a chestnut oak, a black maple, two red maples and bushes in the lawn. Some of the bushes produce lovely trumpet-shaped flowers. He also grew flowers such as roses, orchids, sunflowers, lisianthuses (eustomas), lavender, hydrangeas and violets, all of which are in full bloom. Thererr some exquisite flowerpots placed near the lawn as decoration. He mows thr grass every now and then. He occasionally hires s gardener to manicure his garden from time to time. Carter's back garden is enormous which is five thousand square foot in size. It used to be a lawn but he turned it into a meadow covered in wild flowers and exotic flowers. Some of the flower buds haven't opened yet but as the weather gets warmer thr flowers open.

.

與此同時，彭博最著名的莫過於在擔任紐約市長期間積極擴充警權，讓警察可以任意攔阻他們認為的嫌疑犯，並對其搜身。

在攔阻搜身政策實行期間，被搜身的大部分都是沒有牽涉罪行的非裔和拉丁美洲裔人士，因此惹來種族歧視的批評。最後紐約警察的攔阻搜身政策，在2013年被裁定違憲。

.

此外，彭博和他創辦的彭博社均被捲入不少性騷擾和性別歧視的指控。

自1996年以來，共有65名原告向州和聯邦法院提起了近40宗針對彭博社以及彭博個人的勞工訴訟，大部分涉及性別歧視、性侵犯、性騷擾和種族歧視等指控。

.
